items.title: Enterprise baseline discovery
items.name: Enterprise baseline discovery
items.summary: Discovery is testing whether weak baseline trust comes more from missing loop context, uneven flow coverage, or poor telemetry normalization across sites.
items.opportunity: Clarify which baseline gaps most block enterprise expansion decisions.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve telemetry coverage, loop mapping, and enterprise benchmark trust.

riskFocus.question: What most improves enterprise trust in site comparisons?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Loop normalization and verified flow baselines will move trust faster than more dashboard detail alone.

plannedActivities: Compare telemetry completeness across strategic accounts.
Audit loop-model gaps in the top expansion accounts.
Test revised enterprise baseline views with water-program leaders.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which baseline validation steps become mandatory for enterprise rollout.

items.title: Value proof discovery
items.name: Value proof discovery
items.summary: Discovery is testing which proof elements most change renewal and site-expansion decisions: baseline credibility, executive narrative, or integration into customer reporting.
items.opportunity: Clarify what makes verified savings packs strong enough to trigger expansion.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve value proof packs and executive review flows.

riskFocus.question: Which proof format most improves expansion readiness?
riskFocus.hypothesis: A single operating and value pack will outperform isolated savings snapshots.

plannedActivities: Compare current proof packs used in successful and stalled expansions.
Test executive-summary and deep-dive review formats.
Map required exports into customer sustainability and finance workflows.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which proof pack becomes standard for strategic-account reviews.

items.title: Plant response discovery
items.name: Plant response discovery
items.summary: Discovery is testing whether slow response is driven more by alarm noise, unclear recommendations, or weak mobile closure patterns.
items.opportunity: Clarify which workflow changes reduce utility-loop response time fastest.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve loop-specific alarm trust and mobile response.

riskFocus.question: What most improves response speed at the plant?
riskFocus.hypothesis: More specific loop context and one-tap mobile action capture will outperform escalation reminders alone.

plannedActivities: Review critical alarms by plant and loop type.
Compare accepted versus ignored remote recommendations.
Test revised mobile closure steps with field specialists.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which alert and mobile patterns become the standard utility response flow.

items.title: Wastewater and reuse discovery
items.name: Wastewater and reuse discovery
items.summary: Discovery is testing whether reuse expansion is blocked more by treatment stability, evidence quality, or weak value framing.
items.opportunity: Clarify what makes wastewater customers ready to adopt reuse workflows.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve wastewater risk visibility, evidence completeness, and reuse-readiness scoring.

riskFocus.question: What most improves reuse adoption from existing wastewater accounts?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Clear reuse-readiness scoring and verified freshwater-displacement value will outperform generic circularity messaging.

plannedActivities: Review reuse readiness patterns across monitored wastewater sites.
Test revised compliance and reuse review packs.
Compare successful and stalled reuse proposals.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which wastewater sites and value conditions qualify for the standard reuse rollout.
